title: SEO Agent Handoff Payload
description: Minimum contract for passing work from one SEO agent to another.

context_summary.description: Compressed context the receiving agent needs.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence artifacts or labels that support the handoff.

requested_action.description: Specific action requested from the receiving agent.

risk_level.description: Risk level of the requested action.

acceptance_criteria.description: Conditions the receiving agent must satisfy.

due_trigger.description: Time, workflow step, or condition that determines when this handoff is due.

examples.reason: Template-level canonical bug requires code implementation.
examples.context_summary: Localized product pages emit canonical URLs pointing to the US version.
examples.requested_action: Patch product template canonical generation and add regression test.
